case_title: THE HANNEKER HOMES, INC. VS. YVETTE NORMAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC. SERVED JUN-08-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 18 BANNEKER WAY, #E, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC. SERVED JUN-07-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $9.40 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANNEKER HOMES, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, YVETTE
